widgets_values:
This image is a photograph showcasing a luxurious, intricate butterfly ring. The ring features a prominent butterfly design, with the body of the butterfly crafted in a smooth, shiny gold. The butterfly's wings are made of a combination of gold and clear glass, giving a delicate and elegant appearance. The wings are adorned with sparkling, multi-faceted gemstones, primarily in shades of pink, red, and orange, which add a touch of opulence and vibrancy to the piece.

The butterfly's body is detailed with fine lines and curves, enhancing its lifelike quality. The butterfly's antennae are also crafted from the same gold material, adding to the overall cohesive design. The ring itself is a smooth, polished gold band, seamlessly integrating with the butterfly design.

The background is minimalistic and white, with subtle shadows and light reflections, which accentuate the ring's brilliance and craftsmanship. The ring is positioned slightly off-center, with the butterfly facing diagonally to the right. The overall aesthetic of the photograph is clean and elegant, emphasizing the ring's intricate details and luxurious materials. The lighting is soft and even, highlighting the textures and colors without casting harsh shadows. This image likely appears in a high-end jewelry catalog or an online store showcasing exclusive and high-quality accessories.

The image shows a pair of earrings from the brand Chanel. The earrings are in the shape of a heart with the word "CHANEL" written in the center. The heart is made of gold and has a textured surface with small diamonds scattered throughout. The diamonds are arranged in a symmetrical pattern around the heart. The overall design of the earrings is elegant and luxurious.

混合（高级）不透明度：
0表示为白底图；
100表示使用原图背景；
50表示50%透明的白底图；
